root_text.an7.37:1.1: “Sattahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu mitto sevitabbo bhajitabbo payirupāsitabbo api panujjamānenapi.
root_text.an7.37:1.3: Piyo ca hoti manāpo ca garu ca bhāvanīyo ca vattā ca vacanakkhamo ca gambhīrañca kathaṁ kattā hoti, no ca aṭṭhāne niyojeti.
root_text.an7.37:1.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, sattahi dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu mitto sevitabbo bhajitabbo payirupāsitabbo api panujjamānenapīti.

translation_text.an7.37:1.1: “Mendicants, when a friend has seven qualities you should associate with, accompany, and attend them, even if they drive you away.
translation_text.an7.37:1.3: They’re likable, agreeable, respected, and admired. They admonish you and they accept admonishment. They speak on deep matters. And they don’t urge you to do bad things.
translation_text.an7.37:1.4: When a friend has these seven qualities you should associate with, accompany, and attend them, even if they drive you away.
translation_text.an7.37:2.4: and doesn’t urge you to do bad.
translation_text.an7.37:3.2: these things are found is your friend.
translation_text.an7.37:3.3: If you want to have a friend,
translation_text.an7.37:3.5: then even if they chase you away,
translation_text.an7.37:3.6: you should keep company with that sort.”

reference_text.an7.37:1.1: csp1ed16.422, csp2ed16.422, ms16A7_197, msdiv37, pts-vp-pli4.32, vri38.184
